headline: Trump 🍊👑 DUMPS Iran Ceasefire 💥🚫 'Scum' & 'Cuckoo' 🤪😡
text: Orange Daddy 🍊💼 just YEETED the ceasefire 🚫✌️ into the TRASH CAN 🗑️🔥 after US & Iran swapped STRIKES 💣💥 like crypto bros swapping NFTs 🤡📉! Trump called Iranian leaders 'SCUM' 🦠🤢 and 'CUCKOO' 🐦🤪, basically saying they're more unhinged than a Twitter meltdown at 3am 🌃💀! Oil prices JUMPED 🐸💸 but still not as high as when the Strait of Hormuz got fully CLOGGED 🚢🚫 like a bad OnlyFans sub 💦😩! Tuesday-Wednesday was the HOTTEST 🔥 trading of missiles since the June MoU deal that was supposed to END the beef 🥩❌ and let boats sail FREE 🛳️🆓 through Hormuz! Centcom said they dropped 'POWERFUL' strikes after tankers got HOOKED 🎣🚢, Iran clapped back by tagging US spots in Bahrain & Kuwait like they were spray-painting memes on the White House lawn 🏛️🎨! Trump straight up revoked the oil sanctions SUSPENSION 🛑🛢️ and said 'I don't CARE 🤷‍♂️, it's a WASTE of TIME ⏰💸 dealing with LIARS 🤥'! Meanwhile Nato boss Mark Rutte 👴🗣️ called the US strikes 'ABSOLUTELY NECESSARY' ✅🔨 cuz Iran was violating the ceasefire like it was a TikTok trend 🕺💔! Iran's speaker Ghalibaf said 'era of BULLYING is OVER' 😤 but Trump replied 'I don't FOLD 🃏🚫, talk to my negotiators Steve Witkoff & Jared Kushner if y'all wanna keep playing 4D chess ♟️👑'! Ayatollah Khamenei funeral vibes in Iraq & Mashhad while the war keeps popping off like a bad sequel nobody asked for 🎥💥! Trump says 'I don't wanna WASTE my time' but leaves the door cracked for the negotiators if they feel like simping for peace 🤝😩!
